
Everyone is so sensitive now that you can’t even tell a joke.
I officially hate my school's "no-phone" policy more than anything.
Group chats are the fastest way to lose all your friends.
Prime drinks are officially the most overrated thing in history.
Microtransactions are literally legal robbery for kids.
Summer break is actually the most boring time of the year.
Having a "crush" in middle school is a massive trap.
Fake friends are easier to find than real ones these days.
School bathrooms are literally the most dangerous places on earth.
My principal just made the most "mid" rule I’ve ever heard.
Why being "popular" in middle school is actually a massive L.
Private stories are where the real villains live.
